body_transformation: The bulbous body now bears molten gold scales with deep crimson lava cracks, the skull and crossbones symbol on the chest rendered in cracked obsidian with ember sparks. Clouds around the head transform into swirling smoke trails with amber glows, while the curled tail tip ignites into a flickering flame, its wisps now glowing embers. Short stubby legs gain heat-haze distortion around joints, and the entire form radiates a molten gold sheen with charcoal black accents along seams. The original low stance remains intact, with all structural elements preserved beneath the fiery texture.
signature_feature: Chest symbol: cracked obsidian with ember sparks and molten gold seams.
